overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a character in a long dark coat walking through a snowy mountain landscape at night. The character traverses from an open field past a lit lamppost and stone ruins, proceeding toward a distant illuminated archway in a high-fidelity rendered environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain field with scattered rocks

events.description: character walks over a glowing white object on the snow, likely collecting a game item

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through open snow field toward a distant lit lamppost

entered.detail: single lit lamppost casting warm orange glow on the snow
snow-covered mountain peaks under dark blue night sky
snow-dusted boulders and rocks lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide open snowy field at night, approaching a solitary lamppost in the distance. The landscape features scattered rocks and sparse dry grass patches under a clear starry sky. At around 11 seconds, the character passes over a glowing white object on the ground.

events.description: passing close to the lit lamppost, warm light briefly illuminates the character and surroundings

agents.ego_description: passing the lamppost and continuing toward ancient stone tower ruins ahead

entered.detail: tall rectangular stone structure with weathered walls and small windows

segments.scene_description: The character passes the warm lamppost and continues along the trail as a large stone tower ruin comes into view on the left. The path remains relatively open but begins to narrow as the character approaches the ancient stone structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing mountain pass between rock formations

events.description: terrain narrows significantly as path enters a rocky canyon with walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating through increasingly narrow terrain with stone walls rising on both sides

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face covered in snow and sparse vegetation
large stone archway structure with warm light visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between rocky outcrops as the character moves past the stone tower, which recedes into the distance on the left. A large stone archway becomes visible ahead in the distance, and the terrain takes on a canyon-like character with rock walls closing in.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed canyon passage approaching illuminated arch

agents.ego_description: approaching the distant illuminated archway through a narrow snow-covered canyon

entered.detail: tall stone wall forming the left boundary of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed canyon with stone walls on both sides, approaching the illuminated archway that now dominates the view ahead. The stone tower has disappeared from view behind, and the path feels increasingly confined as the destination grows closer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast, starry mountain landscape that gradually tightens into a narrow stone canyon. It begins with the character traversing a wide, open snowy field dotted with rocks and dry grass, passing over a glowing white object on the ground while approaching a solitary lamppost. As the character passes the warm glow of the lamp, the environment shifts as a large stone tower ruin emerges on the left and the open trail begins to narrow. The scene then transitions into a canyon-like terrain where rocky outcrops close in and the tower recedes into the distance, revealing a large, illuminated archway ahead. Finally, the path becomes an enclosed corridor of stone walls that confine the view, leading the character directly toward the dominating light of the distant archway.
